description_long: This is a heavily damaged and partially destroyed skateboard, with a long, narrow deck that is broken and jagged at both ends. The deck features a colorful, chaotic graphic on one side, with a mix of pink, purple, blue, and white hues, and some visible text and abstract patterns. The underside of the deck is darker, with a partially visible brand logo and a more subdued color palette. The skateboard is equipped with two sets of metal trucks and four wheels, though the wheels appear worn and the trucks are attached to the remaining intact portions of the deck. The object is mounted on a circular, rough base, possibly for display or stabilization, and the overall structure is warped and twisted, indicating significant wear or intentional artistic modification. The surface of the deck appears rough and splintered, with exposed material and irregular edges.
description: A broken, jagged skateboard with colorful graphics, worn wheels, and a rough, splintered deck mounted on a circular base. The deck features chaotic artwork and visible brand markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the colorful, chaotic deck graphic and the jagged, broken top edge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme thinness of the deck and the warped, twisted structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the darker underside of the deck with a partially visible brand logo and the broken lower edge.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the damaged deck, visible trucks, and the circular base.
attribute_brand_logo: A partially visible white logo with the text 'LIBERTY' and a circular emblem on the underside of the deck, located near the rear truck.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The deck features a chaotic, abstract graphic with overlapping text, geometric shapes, and splashes of pink, purple, blue, and white. The design is urban and graffiti-inspired, with no clear central motif but a dynamic, energetic style.
attribute_wheel_type: Longboard-style wheels, medium size, gray in color, with no visible text or branding.
attribute_truck_style: Standard skateboard trucks, metallic silver, top-mounted, with a traditional kingpin design and no visible branding.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: No visible grip tape or pattern; the top surface appears to be bare or covered by the damaged deck material.
